description: Run an annual solar radiation analysis on the fully-covered hangar/canopy in Energy3D. Open 'hangar_baseline.ng3' from ~/Documents/Energy3D/. Set the location to Seattle, WA. Run the Annual Solar Radiation analysis (via Analysis menu). Identify and delete all solar panels that generate less than 250 kWh/year (primarily on the shaded side). Finally, export the optimized array's yield data as a CSV to '~/Documents/Energy3D/optimized_yield.csv' (Right-click a panel -> Export or via Analysis menu), and save the modified building model to '~/Documents/Energy3D/hangar_optimized.ng3'.
